characters.name: Ramil
characters.description: RamilCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMalePronounsHe/HimAgeChildStatusAffiliation(s)The Kings' KitchenMediaFirstappearance"The Chef's Challenge"Voiced byAleks Le Ramilis a American Creek Kid who is a member ofThe Kings' Kitchen. Remil has short, dark purplish hair, a eyebrow slit and a mole on his left cheek.

MercerCannonballHandlebarbWarpspeedToddEnemy(s)Handlebarb{formerly}Cannonball{formerly}Warpspeed{formerly}Todd{formerly}MediaFirstappearanceBeyond the Overpass  Scoot is a short child, nearly the same height on skates as Kelsey. She is non-white with brown skin that has more purple hues. Her eyes, while black, appear purple under her goggles, that have a purple plastic color and gray around the rim. Her hair is dark and curly, tied into two pigtails that stick out of her gray helmet.She wears a pale blue under shirt with an orange, traffic cone vest on top. the vest had two stripes.
